turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello, this is Morgan. How can I help with your account today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Just so you're aware, we record these calls for training.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me confirm a couple details. What name is the account under?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Sure, it's my name and the email I sign in with.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I want to cancel my subscription, I'm not using it anymore.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, I can help with that. Let me check what's on the account.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: There's a loyalty discount I could apply if you'd consider staying.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: How much would that discount actually be?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, I've made up my mind, I just want it cancelled.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Your cancellation is confirmed for the end of the cycle. Anything else?
